        @allure.story("个人资料卡片验证昵称")
        @allure.title("【场景】TC-NICK-003~004 查询个人资料卡片验证社区昵称")
        @pytest.mark.P0
        @pytest.mark.xfail(reason="用户2的token被踢掉(auth_40002)，测试环境限制")
        def test_verify_nickname_from_user_info_card(
            self, community_api, user2_community_api, dashen_user_id, user_user_id
        ):
            """从个人资料卡片验证社区昵称修改结果"""
            data = TEST_DATA["community_flow"]
            community = data["community"]
            nick_data = data["nickname"]
    
            dashen_nick = _random_nick(nick_data["dashen_prefix"])
            user2_nick = nick_data["user2_value"]
    
            # 先修改昵称
            with allure.step("前置：修改大神社区昵称"):
                community_api.upd_user_server_ext(
    server_id=community["nickname_server_id"],
                server_nick_name=dashen_nick,
                )
            with allure.step("前置：修改用户2社区昵称"):
                user2_community_api.upd_user_server_ext(
    server_id=community["nickname_server_id"],
                server_nick_name=user2_nick,
                )
    
            # 验证大神昵称
            with allure.step(f"查询大神个人资料卡片，验证昵称={dashen_nick}"):
                resp = community_api.get_user_info_card(
                    user_id=dashen_user_id,
                    server_id=community["nickname_server_id"],
                )
                result = assert_response_success(resp)
                _assert_ret_code_100(result, "查询大神个人资料卡片")
                # 验证昵称字段
                user_info = result.get("retData", {}).get("userInfo", result.get("retData", {}))
                actual_nick = user_info.get("serverUserName", user_info.get("serverNickName", ""))
                assert dashen_nick in str(actual_nick) or str(actual_nick) == dashen_nick, \
                    f"大神昵称不匹配: 实际={actual_nick}, 期望={dashen_nick}"
    
            # 验证用户2昵称
            with allure.step(f"查询用户2个人资料卡片，验证昵称={user2_nick}"):
                resp = user2_community_api.get_user_info_card(
                    user_id=user_user_id,
                    server_id=community["nickname_server_id"],
                )
                result = assert_response_success(resp)
>               _assert_ret_code_100(result, "查询用户2个人资料卡片")
